_meta.method: Reviewed Plum Village sangha resources, Wake Up network pages, and regional retreat announcements for Morocco; found only temporary Plum Village–led retreats (e.g., desert hiking retreat) but no ongoing sangha with a fixed weekly meeting place.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified ongoing Plum Village / Kwan Um / AZI Zen sangha with a stable Moroccan address).
knownGaps: Plum Village monastics periodically lead retreats in the Moroccan desert, but these are time-limited events without a resident local sangha.
Any small, informal Plum Village–inspired groups meeting in homes or rotating venues are not documented in public directories and so are not captured here.
